title: Engineer - AI /ML Engineer with Python (2 to 4yrs exp)
company_focus:
Low-power wireless connectivity and embedded technology for
IoT
description:
Silicon Labs (NASDAQ: SLAB) is the leading innovator in low-
power wireless connectivity, building embedded technology
that connects devices and improves lives. Merging cutting-
edge technology into the world’s most highly integrated
SoCs, Silicon Labs provides device makers the solutions,
support, and ecosystems needed to create advanced edge
connectivity applications. Headquartered in Austin, Texas,
Silicon Labs has operations in over 16 countries and is the
trusted partner for innovative solutions in the smart home,
industrial IoT, and smart cities markets. Learn more at
www.silabs.com.

The Role

We are seeking a skilled AI Developer with expertise in
Robotic Process Automation (RPA) to join our dynamic team.
The ideal candidate will be responsible for designing,
developing, and implementing AI-driven solutions and RPA
processes to enhance operational efficiency, streamline
workflows, and drive innovation across the organization. The
successful candidate will possess strong technical skills,
an analytical mindset, and the ability to work
collaboratively within a multidisciplinary team.

Responsibilities:

- AI Development:
  - Design, develop, and deploy AI models using machine
    learning, deep learning, and natural language processing
    techniques.
  - Collaborate with cross-functional teams to identify
    opportunities for AI implementation and integration into
    existing systems.
  - Optimize and maintain AI models for performance and accuracy
    while scaling solutions as required.
- Collaboration & Communication:
  - Work closely with business analysts and stakeholders to
    gather requirements, provide updates on project status,
    and ensure alignment with business objectives.
  - Educate and train team members and end-users on the use of
    AI and RPA solutions.
- Documentation & Reporting:
  - Create and maintain technical documentation related to AI
    models, RPA processes, and deployment plans.
  - Generate reports on automation impact and AI performance
    metrics for management review.
- Continuous Improvement:
  - Keep abreast of industry trends, emerging technologies, and
    best practices in AI and RPA.
  - Recommend enhancements and innovations to improve existing
    systems and processes.

Skills you will need

- Bachelor’s degree in computer science, Data Science,
  Engineering, or a related field; a master’s degree is a
  plus.
- One year of Proven experience in AI development (machine
  learning, deep learning, NLP) and proficiency with
  relevant programming languages (e.g., Python, R, Java).
- Minimum 2 years of Hands-on experience with RPA tools -
  Automation Anywhere.
- Strong understanding of data structures, algorithms, and
  software development methodologies.
- Familiarity with cloud platforms (e.g., AWS, Azure, Google
  Cloud) and their AI/RPA services are a plus.
- Excellent problem-solving skills and the ability to work
  independently and collaboratively in a team environment.
- Strong communication skills, both written and verbal, with
  the ability to explain complex concepts to non-technical
  stakeholders.

Preferred skills

- Experience integrating AI solutions with RPA tools and
  workflows.
- Knowledge of additional programming languages (e.g., C#,
  JavaScript) and database management (SQL).
- Certifications in AI (e.g., Google AI, Microsoft AI) and RPA
  (e.g., UiPath Certified Professional) are highly regarded.

Good to have:

- Develop, test, and deploy RPA robots to automate repetitive
  tasks and workflows using RPA tools - Automation Anywhere.

Benefits & Perks

Not only will you be joining a highly skilled and tight-knit
team where every engineer makes a significant impact on the
product; we also strive for good work/life balance and to
make our environment welcoming and fun.

- Equity Rewards (RSUs)
- Employee Stock Purchase Plan (ESPP)
- Insurance plans with Outpatient cover
- National Pension Scheme (NPS)
- Flexible work policy
- Childcare support

Silicon Labs is an equal opportunity employer and values the
diversity of our employees. Employment decisions are made on
the basis of qualifications and job-related criteria without
regard to race, religion, color, national origin, gender,
sexual orientation, age, marital status, veteran status, or
disability status, or any other characteristic protected by
applicable law.
responsibilities: Design, develop, and deploy AI models using machine learning, deep learning, and natural language processing techniques
Collaborate with cross-functional teams to identify opportunities for AI implementation and integration into existing systems
Optimize and maintain AI models for performance and accuracy while scaling solutions as required
Work closely with business analysts and stakeholders to gather requirements and ensure alignment with business objectives

use_cases: Operational efficiency enhancement through AI-driven automation
Workflow streamlining using RPA and AI integration

Cross-functional system integration for AI solutions
ai_classification_reasoning:
The role focuses on RPA (Robotic Process Automation) with
some AI model development. While AI models are mentioned,
the core emphasis is on integrating AI with RPA workflows to
automate business processes rather than building or
deploying cutting-edge AI/ML systems. The heavy emphasis on
RPA tools (Automation Anywhere) and workflow automation
makes this primarily an AI-support role.
